mapper.insert: INSERT INTO holdings_snapshot ( user_id, product_id, snapshot_date, shares, cost, cost_method, nav, nav_date, market_value, unrealized_pnl, return_rate, fetch_date, is_dirty, dirty_from_date, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, #{snapshotDate}, #{shares}, #{cost}, #{costMethod}, #{nav}, #{navDate}, #{marketValue}, #{unrealizedPnl}, #{returnRate}, #{fetchDate}, #{isDirty}, #{dirtyFromDate}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE shares = VALUES(shares), cost = VALUES(cost), cost_method = VALUES(cost_method), nav = VALUES(nav), nav_date = VALUES(nav_date), market_value = VALUES(market_value), unrealized_pnl = VALUES(unrealized_pnl), return_rate = VALUES(return_rate), fetch_date = VALUES(fetch_date), is_dirty = VALUES(is_dirty), dirty_from_date = VALUES(dirty_from_date), updated_at = NOW()
